# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { jwtVerify, SignJWT } from 'jose';

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = 'auth_token';
const REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME = 'refresh_token';
const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key-min-32-chars-long'
);
const REFRESH_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.REFRESH_SECRET || 'your-refresh-secret-key-min-32'
);

const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/login', '/register', '/api/auth/login', '/api/auth/register', '/public'];
const PROTECTED_PATHS = ['/dashboard', '/profile', '/api/protected'];

interface JWTPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  exp?: number;
  iat?: number;
}

async function verifyToken(token: string, secret: Uint8Array): Promise<JWTPayload | null> {
  try {
    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, secret);
    return payload as JWTPayload;
  } catch (error) {
    return null;
  }
}

async function generateAccessToken(payload: JWTPayload): Promise<string> {
  return await new SignJWT({ userId: payload.userId, email: payload.email })
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256' })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime('15m')
    .sign(JWT_SECRET);
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some(path => pathname.startsWith(path));
}

function isProtectedPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PROTECTED_PATHS.some(path => pathname.startsWith(path));
}

function sanitizeCookie(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[^\w\-\.]/g, '');
}

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;

  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  const authToken = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;
  const refreshToken = request.cookies.get(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;

  if (!authToken) {
    if (isProtectedPath(pathname)) {
      const url = request.nextUrl.clone();
      url.pathname = '/login';
      url.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
      
      const response = NextResponse.redirect(url);
      response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'unauthenticated');
      return response;
    }
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  const sanitizedAuthToken = sanitizeCookie(authToken);
  const payload = await verifyToken(sanitizedAuthToken, JWT_SECRET);

  if (payload) {
    const response = NextResponse.next();
    response.headers.set('X-User-Id', payload.userId);
    response.headers.set('X-User-Email', payload.email);
    response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'authenticated');
    return response;
  }

  if (refreshToken) {
    const sanitizedRefreshToken = sanitizeCookie(refreshToken);
    const refreshPayload = await verifyToken(sanitizedRefreshToken, REFRESH_SECRET);

    if (refreshPayload) {
      const newAccessToken = await generateAccessToken(refreshPayload);
      
      const response = NextResponse.next();
      response.cookies.set(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newAccessToken, {
        httpOnly: true,
        secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
        sameSite: 'strict',
        maxAge: 900,
        path: '/',
      });
      response.headers.set('X-User-Id', refreshPayload.userId);
      response.headers.set('X-User-Email', refreshPayload.email);
      response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'authenticated');
      response.headers.set('X-Token-Refreshed', 'true');
      return response;
    }
  }

  if (isProtectedPath(pathname)) {
    const url = request.nextUrl.clone();
    url.pathname = '/login';
    url.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
    
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(url);
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    response.cookies.delete(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
    response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'expired');
    return response;
  }

  const response = NextResponse.next();
  response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
  response.cookies.delete(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME);
  response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'invalid');
  return response;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|.*\\.(?:svg|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp)$).*)',
  ],
};
